name: Trava
description: Trava — Cyber risk management and compliance platform combining vulnerability scanning with insurance-aligned risk scoring.

seo.title: Trava — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Trava: Trava — Cyber risk management and compliance platform combining vulnerability scanning with insurance-aligned risk scoring.

when_to_use: Cyber risk scoring aligned to insurance underwriting criteria
Vulnerability scanning integrated with risk quantification
SOC 2 compliance readiness with continuous monitoring
Cyber insurance application support via risk assessment data
SMB security posture management with compliance guidance

pros: Combines vulnerability scanning with risk scoring
Insurance-aligned risk framing eases cyber coverage
Quick onboarding for SMB security programs
cons: Compliance framework depth lags Vanta and Drata
Vulnerability scanning narrower than dedicated VM tools
Insurance tie-in only useful if pursuing that carrier path
Less product marketing noise makes evaluation harder
review.verdict: A pragmatic SMB and MSP offering that blends risk, compliance, and insurance — jack of three trades, master of none.
review.best_for: SMBs wanting risk and compliance tied to cyber insurance discussions
review.not_for: Dedicated security teams needing specialized vulnerability or GRC tools

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
